I now have a complete map. Here are the seven steps.

## Step 1 — Orientation

**What it is:** `llm.rb` — a pure-Ruby, dependency-light client library for many LLM providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, Ollama, Bedrock, DeepSeek, xAI, zAI, llama.cpp) behind one uniform API. Index: 302 Ruby files, 2188 symbols.

**Layout (`lib/llm/`):**
- `lib/llm.rb:3` — top-level `LLM` module: `require_relative`s the whole tree (`lib/llm.rb:6-39`) and defines the **provider factory methods** a caller uses (`LLM.openai`, `LLM.anthropic`, … `lib/llm.rb:112-181`).
- `lib/llm/provider.rb:8` — `LLM::Provider`, the abstract base every provider subclasses.
- `lib/llm/providers/*.rb` + `lib/llm/providers/<name>/` — one file per provider plus a same-named directory holding its small components (request/response adapters, stream parser, error handler, per-API interfaces).
- Shared machinery: `lib/llm/transport/execution.rb:11` (HTTP execute + parse dispatch), `lib/llm/context.rb` (multi-turn chat), `lib/llm/contract/completion.rb:7` (response shape contract), `lib/llm/error.rb:6` (typed errors), `lib/llm/registry.rb:9` + `data/<name>.json` (model metadata).

**How a caller obtains a provider:** `LLM.<name>(key:, …)` → lazily `require`s `lib/llm/providers/<name>` and returns `LLM::<Name>.new` (e.g. `lib/llm.rb:152-155` for OpenAI). ORM helpers resolve by symbol via `LLM::ActiveRecord::Utils.resolve_provider` (`lib/llm/active_record.rb:59`) and `LLM::Sequel::Plugin::Utils.resolve_provider` (`lib/llm/sequel/plugin.rb:69`).

## Step 2 — Trace of a chat/completion call (top → bottom)

1. **Obtain provider:** `LLM.openai(**)` → `LLM::OpenAI.new` (`lib/llm.rb:152-155`).
2. **Entry:** `LLM::OpenAI#complete` (`lib/llm/providers/openai.rb:73`) — or `#chat` (`lib/llm/provider.rb:103`) which wraps `complete` through `LLM::Context.new(...).talk` (`lib/llm/provider.rb:105`).
3. **Normalize params:** `normalize_complete_params` (`lib/llm/providers/openai.rb:210`) — merges defaults, resolves tools, adapts schema/tools, detects streaming.
4. **Build request:** `build_complete_request` (`lib/llm/providers/openai.rb:222`) → `build_complete_messages` (`:230`) → **request adapter** `adapt(messages, mode: :complete)` (`lib/llm/providers/openai/request_adapter.rb:17`) → per-message `Completion#adapt`; body dumped and set on a `LLM::Transport::Request.post(completions_path, headers)` (`:225-226`).
5. **Execute:** `execute(request:, stream:, operation: "chat", …)` from the mixin `LLM::Transport::Execution#execute` (`lib/llm/transport/execution.rb:31`) → `transport.request` → `handle_response` (`:51`).
6. **Response handling:** on success `parse_response` decodes JSON to `LLM::Object` (`lib/llm/transport/execution.rb:60-65`); on failure it calls the provider's `error_handler` (`:52`).
7. **Parse into library shape:** back in `complete`, `ResponseAdapter.adapt(res, type: :completion)` (`lib/llm/providers/openai.rb:78`) → `LLM::OpenAI::ResponseAdapter.adapt`/`select` (`lib/llm/providers/openai/response_adapter.rb:24,32`) extends the `LLM::Response` with `ResponseAdapter::Completion` (which `include LLM::Contract::Completion`, `.../response_adapter/completion.rb:138`).

## Step 3 — Provider family & base contract (`LLM::Provider`, `lib/llm/provider.rb`)

Direct subclasses (from `sense_graph` `inherited_by`): **Anthropic** (`providers/anthropic.rb:16`), **Bedrock** (`bedrock.rb:33`), **Google** (`google.rb:20`), **Ollama** (`ollama.rb:18`), **OpenAI** (`openai.rb:16`). Reuse-by-inheritance from **OpenAI**: **DeepSeek** (`deepseek.rb:20`), **XAI** (`xai.rb:17`), **ZAI** (`zai.rb:16`), **LlamaCpp** (`llamacpp.rb:22`).

**Base contract — methods that `raise NotImplementedError` unless overridden:**
- `name` (`:55`), `embed` (`:70`), `complete` (`:94`), `responses` (`:126`), `images` (`:133`), `audio` (`:140`), `files` (`:147`), `models` (`:154`), `moderations` (`:161`), `vector_stores` (`:168`), `assistant_role` (`:176`), `default_model` (`:183`), `web_search` (`:243`), and private `headers` (`:362`), `error_handler` (`:371`), `stream_parser` (`:384`).
- **Provided defaults** (override optional): `chat` (`:103`), `respond` (`:114`), `schema` (`:190`), `with` (`:204`), `server_tools`→`{}` (`:216`), `server_tool` (`:233`), role accessors `user_role`/`system_role`/`developer_role`/`tool_role` (`:249-268`), `event_handler`→`LLM::EventHandler` (`:377`), `stream_decoder`→`LLM::Transport::StreamDecoder` (`:391`), `streamable?` (`:338`), `key?` (`:345`), tracer/interrupt helpers.

**How each existing provider customizes:**
- **OpenAI** (`openai.rb`): `include RequestAdapter` (`:29`); overrides `embed`(:54), `complete`(:73), `responses`/`images`/`audio`/`files`/`models`/`moderations`/`vector_stores`(:88-139), `assistant_role`/`default_model`(:143,151), `server_tools`/`web_search`(:161,180), private `completions_path`(:189), `headers`(:193), `stream_parser`(:202), `error_handler`(:206). Richest surface.
- **Anthropic** (`anthropic.rb`): `include RequestAdapter`, `extend Utils` (`:24-25`); overrides `complete`(:52), `models`(:66), `files`(:74), `assistant_role`(:80), **`tool_role`→`:user`**(:89), `default_model`(:97), `server_tools`/`web_search`(:108,125), `headers`/`stream_parser`/`error_handler`(:131,142,146). No embeddings, no responses/images/audio/moderations/vector_stores.
- **Ollama** (`ollama.rb`): overrides `embed`(:49), `complete`(:69), `models`(:83), roles/`default_model`, `headers`/`stream_parser`/`error_handler`(:103,112,116). Local, no `data/ollama.json`.
- **Bedrock** (`bedrock.rb`): AWS SigV4 auth — custom `initialize` with `access_key_id/secret_access_key/region` (`:58`), plus its own `stream_decoder` (AWS binary event stream) and `signature`.
- **DeepSeek** (`deepseek.rb`) `< OpenAI`: re-includes its own `RequestAdapter` (`:22`), overrides `name`/`default_model`/`initialize`, and **disables** `files`/`images`/`audio`/`moderations`/`responses`/`vector_stores` back to `NotImplementedError` (`:40-72`).
- **XAI** (`xai.rb`) `< OpenAI`: overrides host, `name`, re-enables `images`→`XAI::Images` (`:43`), disables the rest.
- **ZAI** (`zai.rb`) `< OpenAI`: overrides host, `name`, `default_model`, private `completions_path`→`/api/paas/v4/chat/completions` (`:77`), disables extras.
- **LlamaCpp** (`llamacpp.rb`) `< OpenAI`: overrides host/port/ssl, `name`, `default_model`, disables extras. Local, no data file.

## Step 4 — Per-provider component families

Each full provider owns a parallel set under `lib/llm/providers/<name>/`:

| Component | Contract / dispatch | OpenAI | Anthropic | Ollama | Google | Bedrock |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| **RequestAdapter** (builds outgoing body) | module `#adapt(messages, mode:)` | `openai/request_adapter.rb:17` (+`request_adapter/completion.rb`, `respond.rb`, `moderation.rb`) | `anthropic/request_adapter.rb` (+`/completion.rb`) | `ollama/request_adapter.rb` (+`/completion.rb`) | `google/request_adapter.rb` (+`/completion.rb`) | `bedrock/request_adapter.rb` (+`/completion.rb`) |
| **ResponseAdapter** (parses into `LLM::Response`) | `module_function adapt`/`select` | `openai/response_adapter.rb:24` (10 types) | `anthropic/response_adapter.rb` (completion, enumerable, file, models, web_search) | `ollama/response_adapter.rb` (completion, embedding, models) | `google/response_adapter.rb` (completion, embedding, file, files, image, models, web_search) | `bedrock/response_adapter.rb` (completion, models) |
| **StreamParser** | class `#parse!`/`#body`/`#free` | `openai/stream_parser.rb:6` | `anthropic/stream_parser.rb:6` | `ollama/stream_parser.rb` | `google/stream_parser.rb` | `bedrock/stream_parser.rb` |
| **ErrorHandler** | class `.new(tracer,span,res)`/`#raise_error!` | `openai/error_handler.rb:6` | `anthropic/error_handler.rb:6` | `ollama/error_handler.rb` | `google/error_handler.rb` | `bedrock/error_handler.rb` |
| **Models** (API iface) | `.new(provider)` | `openai/models.rb` | `anthropic/models.rb` | `ollama/models.rb` | `google/models.rb` | `bedrock/models.rb` |
| Extra API ifaces | — | responses, images, audio, files, moderations, vector_stores | files, utils | — | audio, images, files, utils | signature, **stream_decoder** |

**Wiring (per provider `.rb`):** `require_relative`s of the components + `include RequestAdapter`, then private `stream_parser`/`error_handler` return the concrete classes and `headers` supplies auth (e.g. `openai.rb:17-27, 202-207`; `anthropic.rb:17-24, 142-147`; `bedrock.rb:34-45`). Response type is selected at each call site (`ResponseAdapter.adapt(res, type: …)`). Response adapters' `Completion` `include LLM::Contract::Completion` (`openai/response_adapter/completion.rb:138`, `anthropic/.../completion.rb:123`).

**Reuse providers** (DeepSeek/XAI/ZAI/LlamaCpp) inherit OpenAI's response adapter, stream parser, error handler, and Models; DeepSeek adds only its own `RequestAdapter` (`deepseek/request_adapter.rb` + `/completion.rb`), the others reuse OpenAI's request adapter entirely.

## Step 5 — Streaming & error paths

**Streaming (incremental parse):**
- Shared plumbing: `LLM::Transport::Execution#execute` wraps the sink as `LLM::Object.from(streamer:, parser: stream_parser, decoder: stream_decoder)` (`lib/llm/transport/execution.rb:32`); default decoder `LLM::Transport::StreamDecoder` (`provider.rb:391`), default `event_handler` `LLM::EventHandler` (`provider.rb:377`).
- Per-provider `StreamParser` classes expose `parse!(chunk)`, `body`, `free`: OpenAI `openai/stream_parser.rb:6` (merges `choices[].delta`, emits `on_content`/`on_reasoning_content`/`on_tool_call`, `resolve_tool` at `:187`); Anthropic `anthropic/stream_parser.rb:6` (content-block based, body seeded `{"role"=>"assistant","content"=>[]}`); Ollama `ollama/stream_parser.rb`; Google `google/stream_parser.rb`; Bedrock `bedrock/stream_parser.rb` **plus custom binary** `bedrock/stream_decoder.rb` (AWS event-stream framing, overriding the default). Each provider selects its parser via private `stream_parser` (`openai.rb:202`, `anthropic.rb:142`, `ollama.rb:112`). Reuse providers inherit OpenAI's.

**Errors (HTTP failure → typed error):**
- Dispatch: `handle_response` calls `error_handler.new(tracer, span, res).raise_error!` on non-2xx (`lib/llm/transport/execution.rb:52`).
- Per-provider `ErrorHandler#error` maps status/body → typed error: OpenAI `openai/error_handler.rb:51` (server/unauthorized/rate-limit/not-found, then body `error.type`: `invalid_request_error`→`InvalidRequestError`/`ContextWindowError` at `:75`); Anthropic `anthropic/error_handler.rb:45` (status-only mapping); Ollama/Google/Bedrock analogous `error_handler.rb`.
- **Shared typed error hierarchy** (`lib/llm/error.rb`): `Error` base (`:6`), `UnauthorizedError`(:28), `RateLimitError`(:32), `ServerError`(:36), `NotFoundError`(:40), `InvalidRequestError`(:52), `ContextWindowError < InvalidRequestError`(:56), plus `Interrupt`(:68) raised by `execute` on transport interrupt (`transport/execution.rb:39-41`).

## Step 6 — Every site that must change to add a provider "Foo"

**Obtainable:** add factory `LLM.foo(**)` in `lib/llm.rb` (alongside `:112-181`) — lazy-require + `LLM::Foo.new`. (If ORM-selectable, both `resolve_provider` maps handle it via `LLM.public_send(name)` — verify at `lib/llm/active_record.rb:59`, `lib/llm/sequel/plugin.rb:69`.)
**Provider class:** `lib/llm/providers/foo.rb` — `class Foo < Provider` (or `< OpenAI` for an OpenAI-compatible API), implementing the Step 3 contract.
**Requires (top of `foo.rb`):** its component files, and `include RequestAdapter`.
**Components:** `lib/llm/providers/foo/{request_adapter.rb + request_adapter/completion.rb, response_adapter.rb + response_adapter/completion.rb, stream_parser.rb, error_handler.rb, models.rb}` (skip any inherited from a superclass).
**Errors:** reuse `lib/llm/error.rb` types; add new ones there only if Foo needs a category not present.
**Model registry:** `data/foo.json` (unless local like ollama/llamacpp, which ship none).
**Tests:** `spec/foo/` with `chat_spec.rb` (+ `models_spec.rb`, `request_adapter_spec.rb`, etc.), using shared examples `"LLM::Context: completions/text stream/tool stream/functions"` (`spec/support/shared_examples/…`), keyed by the provider symbol as in `spec/zai/chat_spec.rb`. Add fixtures/cassettes under `spec/fixtures`.

## Step 7 — Edit map for a new provider

Assume "Foo," OpenAI-compatible (mirror DeepSeek — the smallest full addition). If Foo needs a bespoke wire format, mirror Anthropic/Ollama instead and create the full component set.

**CREATE**
- `lib/llm/providers/foo.rb` — `class Foo < OpenAI` (template: `deepseek.rb:20`); override `initialize`(host), `name`, `default_model`; disable unsupported `files/images/audio/moderations/responses/vector_stores` (`deepseek.rb:40-72`); if the wire body differs, `require_relative "foo/request_adapter"; include Foo::RequestAdapter`.
- `lib/llm/providers/foo/request_adapter.rb` + `request_adapter/completion.rb` — only if body differs from OpenAI (template: `deepseek/request_adapter.rb`, `deepseek/request_adapter/completion.rb`).
- *(Full/bespoke provider only)* `foo/response_adapter.rb` + `response_adapter/completion.rb` (which must `include LLM::Contract::Completion`, cf. `openai/response_adapter/completion.rb:138`), `foo/stream_parser.rb`, `foo/error_handler.rb`, `foo/models.rb`.
- `data/foo.json` — model metadata (skip if local-only). Loaded by `LLM::Registry.for` (`lib/llm/registry.rb:15`).
- `spec/foo/chat_spec.rb` (template: `spec/zai/chat_spec.rb`) + `spec/foo/models_spec.rb`, and `spec/foo/request_adapter_spec.rb` if a custom adapter (template: `spec/deepseek/`). Fixtures under `spec/fixtures`.

I now have a complete map. Here are the seven steps.

## Step 1 — Orientation

**What it is:** `llm.rb` — a pure-Ruby, dependency-light client library for many LLM providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, Ollama, Bedrock, DeepSeek, xAI, zAI, llama.cpp) behind one uniform API. Index: 302 Ruby files, 2188 symbols.

**Layout (`lib/llm/`):**
- `lib/llm.rb:3` — top-level `LLM` module: `require_relative`s the whole tree (`lib/llm.rb:6-39`) and defines the **provider factory methods** a caller uses (`LLM.openai`, `LLM.anthropic`, … `lib/llm.rb:112-181`).
- `lib/llm/provider.rb:8` — `LLM::Provider`, the abstract base every provider subclasses.
- `lib/llm/providers/*.rb` + `lib/llm/providers/<name>/` — one file per provider plus a same-named directory holding its small components (request/response adapters, stream parser, error handler, per-API interfaces).
- Shared machinery: `lib/llm/transport/execution.rb:11` (HTTP execute + parse dispatch), `lib/llm/context.rb` (multi-turn chat), `lib/llm/contract/completion.rb:7` (response shape contract), `lib/llm/error.rb:6` (typed errors), `lib/llm/registry.rb:9` + `data/<name>.json` (model metadata).

**How a caller obtains a provider:** `LLM.<name>(key:, …)` → lazily `require`s `lib/llm/providers/<name>` and returns `LLM::<Name>.new` (e.g. `lib/llm.rb:152-155` for OpenAI). ORM helpers resolve by symbol via `LLM::ActiveRecord::Utils.resolve_provider` (`lib/llm/active_record.rb:59`) and `LLM::Sequel::Plugin::Utils.resolve_provider` (`lib/llm/sequel/plugin.rb:69`).

## Step 2 — Trace of a chat/completion call (top → bottom)

1. **Obtain provider:** `LLM.openai(**)` → `LLM::OpenAI.new` (`lib/llm.rb:152-155`).
2. **Entry:** `LLM::OpenAI#complete` (`lib/llm/providers/openai.rb:73`) — or `#chat` (`lib/llm/provider.rb:103`) which wraps `complete` through `LLM::Context.new(...).talk` (`lib/llm/provider.rb:105`).
3. **Normalize params:** `normalize_complete_params` (`lib/llm/providers/openai.rb:210`) — merges defaults, resolves tools, adapts schema/tools, detects streaming.
4. **Build request:** `build_complete_request` (`lib/llm/providers/openai.rb:222`) → `build_complete_messages` (`:230`) → **request adapter** `adapt(messages, mode: :complete)` (`lib/llm/providers/openai/request_adapter.rb:17`) → per-message `Completion#adapt`; body dumped and set on a `LLM::Transport::Request.post(completions_path, headers)` (`:225-226`).
5. **Execute:** `execute(request:, stream:, operation: "chat", …)` from the mixin `LLM::Transport::Execution#execute` (`lib/llm/transport/execution.rb:31`) → `transport.request` → `handle_response` (`:51`).
6. **Response handling:** on success `parse_response` decodes JSON to `LLM::Object` (`lib/llm/transport/execution.rb:60-65`); on failure it calls the provider's `error_handler` (`:52`).
7. **Parse into library shape:** back in `complete`, `ResponseAdapter.adapt(res, type: :completion)` (`lib/llm/providers/openai.rb:78`) → `LLM::OpenAI::ResponseAdapter.adapt`/`select` (`lib/llm/providers/openai/response_adapter.rb:24,32`) extends the `LLM::Response` with `ResponseAdapter::Completion` (which `include LLM::Contract::Completion`, `.../response_adapter/completion.rb:138`).

## Step 3 — Provider family & base contract (`LLM::Provider`, `lib/llm/provider.rb`)

Direct subclasses (from `sense_graph` `inherited_by`): **Anthropic** (`providers/anthropic.rb:16`), **Bedrock** (`bedrock.rb:33`), **Google** (`google.rb:20`), **Ollama** (`ollama.rb:18`), **OpenAI** (`openai.rb:16`). Reuse-by-inheritance from **OpenAI**: **DeepSeek** (`deepseek.rb:20`), **XAI** (`xai.rb:17`), **ZAI** (`zai.rb:16`), **LlamaCpp** (`llamacpp.rb:22`).

**Base contract — methods that `raise NotImplementedError` unless overridden:**
- `name` (`:55`), `embed` (`:70`), `complete` (`:94`), `responses` (`:126`), `images` (`:133`), `audio` (`:140`), `files` (`:147`), `models` (`:154`), `moderations` (`:161`), `vector_stores` (`:168`), `assistant_role` (`:176`), `default_model` (`:183`), `web_search` (`:243`), and private `headers` (`:362`), `error_handler` (`:371`), `stream_parser` (`:384`).
- **Provided defaults** (override optional): `chat` (`:103`), `respond` (`:114`), `schema` (`:190`), `with` (`:204`), `server_tools`→`{}` (`:216`), `server_tool` (`:233`), role accessors `user_role`/`system_role`/`developer_role`/`tool_role` (`:249-268`), `event_handler`→`LLM::EventHandler` (`:377`), `stream_decoder`→`LLM::Transport::StreamDecoder` (`:391`), `streamable?` (`:338`), `key?` (`:345`), tracer/interrupt helpers.

**How each existing provider customizes:**
- **OpenAI** (`openai.rb`): `include RequestAdapter` (`:29`); overrides `embed`(:54), `complete`(:73), `responses`/`images`/`audio`/`files`/`models`/`moderations`/`vector_stores`(:88-139), `assistant_role`/`default_model`(:143,151), `server_tools`/`web_search`(:161,180), private `completions_path`(:189), `headers`(:193), `stream_parser`(:202), `error_handler`(:206). Richest surface.
- **Anthropic** (`anthropic.rb`): `include RequestAdapter`, `extend Utils` (`:24-25`); overrides `complete`(:52), `models`(:66), `files`(:74), `assistant_role`(:80), **`tool_role`→`:user`**(:89), `default_model`(:97), `server_tools`/`web_search`(:108,125), `headers`/`stream_parser`/`error_handler`(:131,142,146). No embeddings, no responses/images/audio/moderations/vector_stores.
- **Ollama** (`ollama.rb`): overrides `embed`(:49), `complete`(:69), `models`(:83), roles/`default_model`, `headers`/`stream_parser`/`error_handler`(:103,112,116). Local, no `data/ollama.json`.
- **Bedrock** (`bedrock.rb`): AWS SigV4 auth — custom `initialize` with `access_key_id/secret_access_key/region` (`:58`), plus its own `stream_decoder` (AWS binary event stream) and `signature`.
- **DeepSeek** (`deepseek.rb`) `< OpenAI`: re-includes its own `RequestAdapter` (`:22`), overrides `name`/`default_model`/`initialize`, and **disables** `files`/`images`/`audio`/`moderations`/`responses`/`vector_stores` back to `NotImplementedError` (`:40-72`).
- **XAI** (`xai.rb`) `< OpenAI`: overrides host, `name`, re-enables `images`→`XAI::Images` (`:43`), disables the rest.
- **ZAI** (`zai.rb`) `< OpenAI`: overrides host, `name`, `default_model`, private `completions_path`→`/api/paas/v4/chat/completions` (`:77`), disables extras.
- **LlamaCpp** (`llamacpp.rb`) `< OpenAI`: overrides host/port/ssl, `name`, `default_model`, disables extras. Local, no data file.

## Step 4 — Per-provider component families

Each full provider owns a parallel set under `lib/llm/providers/<name>/`:

| Component | Contract / dispatch | OpenAI | Anthropic | Ollama | Google | Bedrock |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| **RequestAdapter** (builds outgoing body) | module `#adapt(messages, mode:)` | `openai/request_adapter.rb:17` (+`request_adapter/completion.rb`, `respond.rb`, `moderation.rb`) | `anthropic/request_adapter.rb` (+`/completion.rb`) | `ollama/request_adapter.rb` (+`/completion.rb`) | `google/request_adapter.rb` (+`/completion.rb`) | `bedrock/request_adapter.rb` (+`/completion.rb`) |
| **ResponseAdapter** (parses into `LLM::Response`) | `module_function adapt`/`select` | `openai/response_adapter.rb:24` (10 types) | `anthropic/response_adapter.rb` (completion, enumerable, file, models, web_search) | `ollama/response_adapter.rb` (completion, embedding, models) | `google/response_adapter.rb` (completion, embedding, file, files, image, models, web_search) | `bedrock/response_adapter.rb` (completion, models) |
| **StreamParser** | class `#parse!`/`#body`/`#free` | `openai/stream_parser.rb:6` | `anthropic/stream_parser.rb:6` | `ollama/stream_parser.rb` | `google/stream_parser.rb` | `bedrock/stream_parser.rb` |
| **ErrorHandler** | class `.new(tracer,span,res)`/`#raise_error!` | `openai/error_handler.rb:6` | `anthropic/error_handler.rb:6` | `ollama/error_handler.rb` | `google/error_handler.rb` | `bedrock/error_handler.rb` |
| **Models** (API iface) | `.new(provider)` | `openai/models.rb` | `anthropic/models.rb` | `ollama/models.rb` | `google/models.rb` | `bedrock/models.rb` |
| Extra API ifaces | — | responses, images, audio, files, moderations, vector_stores | files, utils | — | audio, images, files, utils | signature, **stream_decoder** |

**Wiring (per provider `.rb`):** `require_relative`s of the components + `include RequestAdapter`, then private `stream_parser`/`error_handler` return the concrete classes and `headers` supplies auth (e.g. `openai.rb:17-27, 202-207`; `anthropic.rb:17-24, 142-147`; `bedrock.rb:34-45`). Response type is selected at each call site (`ResponseAdapter.adapt(res, type: …)`). Response adapters' `Completion` `include LLM::Contract::Completion` (`openai/response_adapter/completion.rb:138`, `anthropic/.../completion.rb:123`).

**Reuse providers** (DeepSeek/XAI/ZAI/LlamaCpp) inherit OpenAI's response adapter, stream parser, error handler, and Models; DeepSeek adds only its own `RequestAdapter` (`deepseek/request_adapter.rb` + `/completion.rb`), the others reuse OpenAI's request adapter entirely.

## Step 5 — Streaming & error paths

**Streaming (incremental parse):**
- Shared plumbing: `LLM::Transport::Execution#execute` wraps the sink as `LLM::Object.from(streamer:, parser: stream_parser, decoder: stream_decoder)` (`lib/llm/transport/execution.rb:32`); default decoder `LLM::Transport::StreamDecoder` (`provider.rb:391`), default `event_handler` `LLM::EventHandler` (`provider.rb:377`).
- Per-provider `StreamParser` classes expose `parse!(chunk)`, `body`, `free`: OpenAI `openai/stream_parser.rb:6` (merges `choices[].delta`, emits `on_content`/`on_reasoning_content`/`on_tool_call`, `resolve_tool` at `:187`); Anthropic `anthropic/stream_parser.rb:6` (content-block based, body seeded `{"role"=>"assistant","content"=>[]}`); Ollama `ollama/stream_parser.rb`; Google `google/stream_parser.rb`; Bedrock `bedrock/stream_parser.rb` **plus custom binary** `bedrock/stream_decoder.rb` (AWS event-stream framing, overriding the default). Each provider selects its parser via private `stream_parser` (`openai.rb:202`, `anthropic.rb:142`, `ollama.rb:112`). Reuse providers inherit OpenAI's.

**Errors (HTTP failure → typed error):**
- Dispatch: `handle_response` calls `error_handler.new(tracer, span, res).raise_error!` on non-2xx (`lib/llm/transport/execution.rb:52`).
- Per-provider `ErrorHandler#error` maps status/body → typed error: OpenAI `openai/error_handler.rb:51` (server/unauthorized/rate-limit/not-found, then body `error.type`: `invalid_request_error`→`InvalidRequestError`/`ContextWindowError` at `:75`); Anthropic `anthropic/error_handler.rb:45` (status-only mapping); Ollama/Google/Bedrock analogous `error_handler.rb`.
- **Shared typed error hierarchy** (`lib/llm/error.rb`): `Error` base (`:6`), `UnauthorizedError`(:28), `RateLimitError`(:32), `ServerError`(:36), `NotFoundError`(:40), `InvalidRequestError`(:52), `ContextWindowError < InvalidRequestError`(:56), plus `Interrupt`(:68) raised by `execute` on transport interrupt (`transport/execution.rb:39-41`).

## Step 6 — Every site that must change to add a provider "Foo"

**Obtainable:** add factory `LLM.foo(**)` in `lib/llm.rb` (alongside `:112-181`) — lazy-require + `LLM::Foo.new`. (If ORM-selectable, both `resolve_provider` maps handle it via `LLM.public_send(name)` — verify at `lib/llm/active_record.rb:59`, `lib/llm/sequel/plugin.rb:69`.)
**Provider class:** `lib/llm/providers/foo.rb` — `class Foo < Provider` (or `< OpenAI` for an OpenAI-compatible API), implementing the Step 3 contract.
**Requires (top of `foo.rb`):** its component files, and `include RequestAdapter`.
**Components:** `lib/llm/providers/foo/{request_adapter.rb + request_adapter/completion.rb, response_adapter.rb + response_adapter/completion.rb, stream_parser.rb, error_handler.rb, models.rb}` (skip any inherited from a superclass).
**Errors:** reuse `lib/llm/error.rb` types; add new ones there only if Foo needs a category not present.
**Model registry:** `data/foo.json` (unless local like ollama/llamacpp, which ship none).
**Tests:** `spec/foo/` with `chat_spec.rb` (+ `models_spec.rb`, `request_adapter_spec.rb`, etc.), using shared examples `"LLM::Context: completions/text stream/tool stream/functions"` (`spec/support/shared_examples/…`), keyed by the provider symbol as in `spec/zai/chat_spec.rb`. Add fixtures/cassettes under `spec/fixtures`.

Assume "Foo," OpenAI-compatible (mirror DeepSeek — the smallest full addition). If Foo needs a bespoke wire format, mirror Anthropic/Ollama instead and create the full component set.
